subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-07-12 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Though the foundation is established, even as was the foundation laid by Jesus Christ, yet should one journey amidst the Christians, one beholdeth that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر چند اساس معین است مثل اساس حضرت مسیح اما اگر کسی در میان نصاری سیر کند می بیند که
subcodes.subjects: @Theosophy, @reincarnation, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
